treatment_information.specific_treatment: Cardiac Catheterization and PCI with stent
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Deployed 2 BMS to the LAD for Proximal 60% and mid vessel 70% stenoses.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient is comfortable lying in bed. Denies any chest pain or shortness of breath after procedure.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 75 mg daily for 1 month, preferably 12 months.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient experienced substernal chest pain and called for an ambulance.
Patient received 4 baby aspirin and a nitro tab.
Patient was transferred to the cath lab due to concern for NSTEMI.
Cardiac catheterization and PCI performed with stent placement.
Patient admitted to the floor, pain subsided, and stable post-procedure.

patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Patient will take aspirin for life and clopidogrel for at least 6 months.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient is ambulatory with assistance and clear mental status.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reports resolution of chest pain and successful overnight recovery.
